positive: Minimalist illustration of a celestial forest at dusk, featuring stylized, abstract trees with glowing bioluminescent leaves and root structures. A crescent moon hangs above, illuminating silhouetted woodland creatures like a gentle deer and flying hummingbirds. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, emphasizing strong contrast between deep indigo and luminous teal. Use clean, graphic lines with a soft, ethereal glow effect, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Style: Pacific Northwest folklore meeting Art Deco graphic design. Cinematic, vaporwave aesthetic, highly detailed, vector art quality, 4k.
